name: Eightfold AI
tagline: Talent intelligence platform powered by deep learning
description: Eightfold AI uses deep learning to match people with opportunities across the entire talent lifecycle. Its Talent Intelligence Platform analyzes over a billion talent profiles to power recruiting, internal mobility, workforce planning, and DEI initiatives. Eightfold's AI understands skills adjacencies and career trajectories to identify hidden talent and predict future potential.
cons: Requires significant data for best results
